gov-user-selection.title: Refine Government Match
gov-user-selection.content: We found live job data for {category}, but couldn't automatically match a government benchmark. Please search for the most relevant government category below:

salary-negotiator.title: Master Negotiations
salary-negotiator.strapline: Knowing your value is only the first step
salary-negotiator.body-html: We've partnered with {name} to help you bridge the gap. Master the exact scripts and strategies used by top executives to secure the pay you actually deserve.
salary-negotiator.name: The Salary Negotiator

purple-cv.title: Career Progression
purple-cv.body-html: Position yourself for your next big move with a professionally written CV from {name}. Their experts design documents specifically to beat the algorithms and stand out to recruiters.
purple-cv.name: PurpleCV

cv-library.title: Get Discovered
cv-library.strapline: Find a job that works for you, fast
cv-library.body-html: Register your free CV on the UK's leading job site ({name}) and let top employers come to you - it's fast, easy and free.
cv-library.name: CV-Library

custom.title: Email Template
custom.strapline: A template script to help you start the conversation.
custom.body-html: Whether you're underpaid or looking to justify a raise, use this script to confidently communicate your value and set up a discussion with your manager.

no-data.title: No exact match found
no-data.could-not-find: We couldn't find enough data for
